query_normalized: dataclaw0: agentic tailoring multimodal data from raw streams computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (b) as it measures the dependent variable of "multimodal data" (specifically multimodal chat-based interaction and situation awareness) within the domain of "autonomous systems," which aligns with the user's focus on agentic tailoring for autonomous vehicles. Additionally, it serves as a foundational or canonical reference (criterion d) for multimodal interfaces in autonomous systems, providing necessary context for a literature review on agentic data tailoring.
